ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., observational, clinical trial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the study is conducted */,
  "publication_link" TEXT /* Link to the publication if the study results are published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the data point belongs to */,
  "person_years" REAL /* Person-years for the data point */,
  "events" INTEGER /* Number of events (e.g., cancer diagnoses) for the data point */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate for the data point */,
  "age_sex_adjusted_hr" REAL /* Age and sex-adjusted hazard ratio for the data point */,
  "multivariable_adjusted_hr" REAL /* Multivariable-adjusted hazard ratio for the data point */,
  "time_dependent_hr" REAL /* Time-dependent hazard ratio for the data point */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the population */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the population */,
  "screening_method" TEXT /* Method used for screening */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistical model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistical model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical model */,
  "model_equation" TEXT /* Equation or formula used in the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  "model_assumptions" TEXT /* Assumptions made in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being analyzed */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistical model used in the analysis */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "confidence_interval_lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES statistical_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the permission is for */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read-only, read-write) for the permission */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* More detailed description of the permission level (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the action was for */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, data access) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data download */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the data */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the data is from */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point downloaded */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the data was downloaded */,
  "download_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data downloaded in bytes */,
  "download_format" TEXT /* Format in which the data was downloaded (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_downloads_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_downloads_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
